stocks.impact_theory: U.S. President Trump announced a 5-day pause on strikes against Iranian power plants following productive talks, causing oil prices to tumble over 8% below $100. This de-escalates war tensions that had spiked oil earlier. Economic implications: lower inflation fears, boosting consumer stocks but hurting energy producers. Market psychology: relief rally in equities, rotation out of energy. Historical parallels: 2019 Iran tensions where oil spiked then fell on diplomacy. Analogies: deflating a balloon after hype (oil rally bursts); tide going out revealing overextended energy positions.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Oil plunge directly hits XOM's upstream revenues. X sentiment shows profit-taking; web news confirms energy sector selloff on de-escalation.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Limited, wait for dip buy if war resumes; potential 2% gain short-term.
potential_profit_risks.short_position: Strong short opportunity, 4-6% downside if oil stabilizes low; risks: renewed tensions spike oil.
potential_profit_risks.key_risks: Geopolitical reversal, supply disruptions elsewhere, strong Q1 earnings.

stocks.justification: Clear catalyst from Trump announcement, consistent with oil correlation (r=0.9 historically).

stocks.impact_theory: Same Iran de-escalation news triggers oil selloff. Implications: reduced refining margins, capex cuts possible. Psychology: fear of prolonged low oil erodes gains from war rally. Parallels: 2022 Ukraine de-escalation dip. Analogies: rug pulled from under oil bulls; sugar high crash after war candy.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Chevron heavily exposed to crude; news searches show sector-wide pressure, X posts highlight short energy.

potential_profit_risks.long_position: Defensive dividend play, 1-2% rebound if stabilizes.

stocks.justification: Strong link but diversified ops provide buffer.

stocks.impact_theory: LNG less tied to crude but global energy volatility from war; de-escalation eases European demand surge. Implications: softer spot prices. Psychology: premarket gainer now reversing. Parallels: 2022 LNG boom fade. Analogies: wave crest receding; party ending early.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Premarket +4% on oil shock, now sentiment shift per Benzinga/FB posts.

stocks.justification: LNG decoupled from oil somewhat, moderate shift.

stocks.impact_theory: Tech rotation amid war fears sold semis; de-escalation sparks broad rally. Implications: lower rates/inflation aids capex. Psychology: buy dip in AI leaders. Parallels: post-2022 dip rebounds. Analogies: storm clouds parting for tech sun; pendulum swing from energy.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Premarket loser now leading Nasdaq bounce; X/web show relief.

stocks.impact_theory: Pure-play upstream hit hard by oil drop. Implications: production cuts loom. Psychology: high beta energy unwind. Parallels: 2020 oil crash. Analogies: race car slamming brakes; house of cards on oil.

news_impact_analysis.reasoning: Premarket mover now reversing on news.

stocks.justification: Volatile small cap, but clear catalyst.
